title: Evidence
description: Universal evidence envelope for every fact and inference in Compass.

category.description: The category domain this evidence belongs to

key.description: The specific attribute this evidence supports

value.description: The value or fact being asserted

confidence.description: Confidence level assigned to this evidence

evidenceClass.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

sourceType.description: The type of source this evidence was derived from

sourceUrl.description: URL to the original source of this evidence

reasoning.description: Explanation of why this inference was made or evidence collected

observedAt.description: Timestamp when this evidence was first observed

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when this evidence was last verified

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when this evidence becomes stale and should be re-evaluated

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering and categorization

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level indicating reliability of a piece of evidence

type.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

source.description: The origin or source of this evidence

detail.description: Detailed description of the evidence content

url.description: URL reference to the source of this evidence

confidence.description: Confidence level in this evidence item

evidenceItem.description: A single evidence item used across the Compass platform

items.description: Collection of evidence items supporting a claim

confidence.description: Aggregate confidence across all items in the bundle

evidenceBundle.description: A bundle of evidence items with an aggregate confidence score

accessedAt.description: Timestamp when the source was accessed

relevance.description: Description of why this source is relevant

sourceReference.description: Reference to an external source of information
